design.principle: veto only; never rewrite home/away to draw
design.veto_rule: reject when p_draw >= draw_floor AND p_draw/(1-pmax) >= draw_share_floor

candidate_is_useful_only_if: aggregate accuracy improves on untouched folds
at least three of four annual folds do not deteriorate materially
selected-100 tail stability does not worsen materially
